title: FloristryWarehouse Tri-Colour Poly Florist Ribbon 50mm x 91m Red White Blue
features: A three-colour florist ribbon ideal for decorating wedding cars and venues or for sports or other events and celebrations
Top quality waterproof poly ribbon with a satin finish as used by professional florists and designers
Easy to tear Into strips and curl if required
description: A three-colour florist ribbon ideal for decorating wedding cars and venues or for sports or other events and celebrations. 2 inches (5cm) wide on a 100yd (91m) roll. Top quality waterproof poly ribbon with a satin finish as used by professional florists and designers. Perfect for bow making, gift wrapping and decorating wedding cars, pew ends and much more. Easily torn into strips and curled.Great value and available in a huge range of colours. See the 'Ribbon' section of our shop. Actual colour may vary a little from the photo depending on your monitor settings. All sizes are approximate.
